mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY_NUMBER, COMPANY_NAME FROM TBL_COMPANY ORDER BY COMPANY_NAME ASC

SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TITLE, U.USER_ID AS MEMBER_ID, C.COMPANY_NAME, TO_CHAR(P.POST_DATE, 'YY.MM.DD') AS POST_CREATED_DATE, P.ANSWER_STATUS FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST'
AND P.COMPANY_NUMBER = #{companyNumber}
AND P.POST_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND U.USER_ID LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY P.POST_NUMBER DESC

SELECT P.POST_NUMBER, P.POST_TITLE, P.POST_CONTENT, U.USER_ID AS MEMBER_ID, TO_CHAR(P.POST_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS POST_CREATED_DATE, P.ANSWER_STATUS, C.COMPANY_NAME FROM TBL_POST P JOIN TBL_USER U ON P.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN TBL_COMPANY C ON P.COMPANY_NUMBER = C.COMPANY_NUMBER WHERE P.POST_NUMBER = #{postNumber} AND P.POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST'

SELECT C.COMMENT_NUMBER, C.POST_NUMBER, C.USER_NUMBER, U.USER_ID AS MEMBER_ID, C.COMMENT_CONTENT, TO_CHAR(C.COMMENT_DATE, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS COMMENT_CREATED_DATE FROM TBL_COMMENT C JOIN TBL_USER U ON C.USER_NUMBER = U.USER_NUMBER WHERE C.POST_NUMBER = #{postNumber} ORDER BY C.COMMENT_NUMBER ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_COMMENT ( COMMENT_NUMBER, POST_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, COMMENT_CONTENT, COMMENT_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_COMMENT_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{postNumber}, #{userNumber}, #{commentContent}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO TBL_POST ( POST_NUMBER, USER_NUMBER, COMPANY_NUMBER, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, POST_TYPE, ANSWER_STATUS, POST_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_POST_NUMBER.NEXTVAL, #{userNumber}, #{companyNumber}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{postType}, #{answerStatus}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(POST_NUMBER) FROM TBL_POST WHERE POST_TYPE = 'QNA_POST'
